# Boris Fedotov

> Personal website of Boris Fedotov — engineer and builder. Skills, projects,
> education, and a Markdown-based blog. (This content is placeholder and will be
> updated once the real content is finalized.)

## Pages

- [Home](/): Intro and overview.
- [Skills](/skills): Languages, frameworks, and tools.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected work and projects.
- [Education](/education): Degrees and milestones.
- [Blog](/blog): Notes and longer-form writing.

## Notes

- Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.
- The blog is file-based Markdown under `content/blog/`.
- Update this file and the site metadata once final content is ready.
